Describe what changed.

## Change classification

- [ ] Public behavior
- [ ] API
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Config/env vars
- [ ] Schema/data contract
- [ ] Operations/deployment
- [ ] Architecture/design
- [ ] Internal-only refactor

## Documentation

- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Generated docs regenerated
- [ ] ADR added/updated
- [ ] Migration notes added
- [ ] No docs needed

If no docs were updated, explain why using this exact marker:

No docs needed: <!-- Required if "No docs needed" is checked -->

## Test-first evidence

- [ ] Failing test or executable reproduction added first
- [ ] Regression test added for a bug fix
- [ ] Characterization test added before refactor
- [ ] Contract test added or updated for API/schema/data-shape changes
- [ ] Property or invariant test considered for broad input spaces
- [ ] Test-quality review completed
- [ ] No tests needed

If no tests were added or changed, explain why:

No tests needed: <!-- Required if "No tests needed" is checked -->

## Verification

- [ ] Tests passed
- [ ] `make docs-lint`
- [ ] `make docs-build`
- [ ] `make docs-generate`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/check_doc_impact.py`
